carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagHead.name: Fake Player Nametag Color (Head)
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagHead.desc: When set to a color name, the nametag background above fake players' heads changes to that color, distinguishing them from real players without altering the name text. Set to false to disable.
Requires the mod installed on the client side to see the color change.
Takes effect immediately for all online players when toggled.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagTab.name: Fake Player Nametag Color (Tab List)
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagTab.desc: When set to a color name, fake player row backgrounds in the tab player list change to that color, distinguishing them from real players without altering the name text. Set to false to disable.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagTab.extra.0: Requires the mod installed on the client side to see the color change.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagTab.extra.1: Takes effect immediately for all online players when toggled.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagCommand.des: When set to a color name, fake player name row backgrounds in the command suggestion list change to that color, distinguishing them from real players without altering the name text. Set to false to disable.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerNametagCommand.ext: Requires the mod installed on the client side to see the color change.
Takes effect immediately for all online players when toggled.
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSleepIgnore.name: Fake Player Sleep Ignore
carpet.rule.fakePlayerSleepIgnore.desc: When enabled, fake players are excluded from the server's sleep count check. Only real players are considered when determining whether enough players are sleeping to skip the night.
Server-side only; no client-side mod installation required.
Takes effect immediately when toggled; no reconnection required.
